GHARACTER CREATION
WELL-CONNECTED TRADER You were born into the Radant family, which for generations has served as CEO of Zettle Metals Incorporated on the world of Califar. Your parents spoiled you rot: ten. You whiled away the weeks exploring your burgeoning ove of history, mainly medieval Japan on Terra_ Your parents sent you to the finest preparatory school, where your timid nature trapped you into being the supplier of illegal products to your fellow students; to your surprise you excelled at it. Embarrassed ver your con- duct, however; your parents refused to sponsor you to university.2 With Iittle choice you attended technica college to pursue career linguistics You switched majors midway through as you realized that making the deal. Instead_ you signed up for your true Iove DropShip pilot training in the hopes of becoming free trader.? Upon graduation_ you were lucky enough to sign on with Jose Ellingsen_ son of the legendary salvage prospector Pedro Ellingsen who owns small fleet of trading vessels. Your first tour launched you Up the ladder as you ventured into the Free Worids League: Tnere you made contact with Word of Blake Precentor and League planetary official, negotiating contract to supply them with parts for the construction of several new HPG stations: Impressed by such lucky break, Jose sent you to open up markets the Capellan Confederation. Fired by rumors that House Liao was attempting open new BattleMech facility; Your estranged parents and negotiated deal you made Up with to trade in metals produced by Zettle Metals Incorporated: Armed with that valuable commodity; you ventured into the Confederation and landed the deal of the decade signing contract for exclusive trade of your commodities with Shengli Arms on Victoria: Wealthy; well-connected and always looking for better deal, you have confidence in your ability to talk yourself out of any situation and you usually end up making money while you 're atit.
Affiliation: Lyran Alliance (p. 291; Stage 1: Early Childhood (White Collar)~Event Roll 351. Preparatory School) Event Roll 391.
